error.secret_note: (the secret must match the value shown in the CMS admin), then reload.

event_archive_progress.this_event_is_large_so_archiving_runs_in: This event is large, so archiving runs in stages. It will continue automatically — keep this page open until it finishes.
event_archive_progress.this_pass_could_not_make_progress_automa: This pass could not make progress automatically. Press “Continue archiving” to retry.

event_archive.archive_this_event_without_merging_guest: Archive this event WITHOUT merging guests into contacts or trashing submissions? It will only be hidden from the events list.
event_archive.the_contact_database_is_larger_than_the_: The contact database is larger than the reconciliation cap — matching covered the first 2000 contacts only. Guests matching a contact beyond the cap may show as new contacts.

event_dashboard.edm_templates_for_this_event_s_invitatio: EDM templates for this event's invitations and blasts.
event_dashboard.guests_who_have_confirmed_or_declined_mo: Guests who have confirmed or declined, most recent first.

event_dashboard.no_email_templates_yet_add_one_to_invite: No email templates yet. Add one to invite or blast this event's guests.
event_dashboard.no_guest_lists_yet_create_one_to_begin_i: No guest lists yet. Create one to begin inviting guests.

event_dashboard.subject: Subject

event_dashboard.this_event_is_being_deleted_in_the_backg: This event is being deleted in the background. Large guest lists can take several minutes to finish.

event_delete_progress.this_event_is_large_so_deletion_runs_in_: This event is large, so deletion runs in stages. It will continue automatically — keep this page open until it finishes.
event_delete_progress.this_pass_could_not_make_progress_automa: This pass could not make progress automatically. Press “Continue deletion” to retry.

event_delete.deleted_items_move_to_the_cms_trash_and_: Deleted items move to the CMS trash and can be restored from there.
event_delete.this_will_also_delete_everything_under_t: This will also delete everything under the event:
event_delete.guest_lists_and_all_guests: guest lists and all of their guests

event_duplicate.choose_how_much_to_bring_across: . Choose how much to bring across.

event_import_preview.import_new_guests_and_update_existing_gu: Import new guests and update existing guests

event_import.column_routes_each_row: column routes each row to that guest list.
event_import.upload_one_csv_for_the_whole_event: Upload one CSV for the whole event. A

event_new.one_time_setup_cost_importing_guests_and: One-time setup cost. Importing guests and sending emails are billed separately per use.

event_registrations.discard_this_registration_the_review_cop: Discard this registration? The review copy moves to trash.
event_registrations.name: Name
event_registrations.self_registrations_from_the_public_rsvp_: Self-registrations from the public RSVP site. Convert adds the person to this event's Adhoc guest list; discard moves the review copy to trash (the stored submission itself is never deleted).

guest_dedupe.name: Name
guest_dedupe.no_identical_copies_found_every_guest_di: No identical copies found — every guest differs from the others in at least one field.
guest_dedupe.only_rows_that_match_another_guest_on_th: Only rows that match another guest on the name and every field group as copies; guests with a check-in, a response, or a registration link are always kept. Removed copies go to the CMS trash, so this can be undone.

guest_form.each_named_companion_has_an_independent_: Each named companion has an independent guest record, QR code, RSVP details, and check-in history.
guest_form.names_are_optional_unnamed_rows_still_re: Names are optional. Unnamed rows still reserve a companion place and QR code.
guest_form.this_guest_belongs_to_an_archived_event_: This guest belongs to an archived event and is read-only.

guest_import_conflict.you_can_continue_letting_the_cms_assign_: You can continue letting the CMS assign new IDs to the conflicting rows. Rows whose ID is free still keep the ID from the file — but QR codes or links from the old system that point at a replaced ID will no longer match.

guest_import_preview.import_new_records_and_update_existing_r: Import new records and update existing records
guest_import_preview.name: Name

guest_import_progress.this_import_is_large_so_it_runs_in_stage: This import is large, so it runs in stages. It will continue automatically — keep this page open until it finishes.
guest_import_progress.this_pass_could_not_apply_any_records_pr: This pass could not apply any records. Press “Continue import” to retry; if it keeps stopping here, split the file into smaller parts and import them one at a time.

guest_import.supported_columns_name_last_name_email_p: Supported columns: name, last_name, email, phone, organization, job_title, plus_guests, status, prefer_language, cc, remarks, checkin_status, checkin_date, checkin_message. You'll see a preview to confirm before anything is created.

guest_list_contacts.remove_the_selected_contacts_guests_from: Remove the selected contacts' guests from this list?
guest_list_contacts.search_and_add_people_to: Search the contact database and add people to
guest_list_contacts.added_guests_stay_linked: Added guests stay linked to their contact record.

guest_list.auto_send_skips_paused_guests_and_anyone: Auto-send skips paused guests and anyone already sent this EDM. “Good” vs “Risky” is a deliverability heuristic on the address; re-send individually below.

guest_list.send_this_edm_to_all_risky_quality_guest: Send this EDM to all risky-quality guests not sent yet?
guest_list.this_guest_list_belongs_to_an_archived_e: This guest list belongs to an archived event and is read-only.

guest_lists.delete_this_guest_list_and_its_guests: Delete this guest list and its guests?
guest_lists.no_guest_lists_yet_create_one_to_begin_i: No guest lists yet. Create one to begin inviting guests.
guest_lists.this_event_is_archived_its_guest_lists_a: This event is archived. Its guest lists and guests are read-only.

guest_table.are_you_sure_you_want_to_re_send_the_ema: Are you sure you want to re-send the email to this guest? This will send another copy of the invitation email.

label_editor.click_an_element_to_select_it_drag_to_mo: Click an element to select it, drag to move. Arrow keys nudge; hold Shift for larger steps.
label_editor.label: Label
label_editor.offsets_are_from_the_parent_s_anchor_poi: Offsets are from the parent's anchor point. Use a "bottom" anchor to sit below the parent's last text line.
label_editor.search_guest_by_name_email_or_organizati: Search guest by name, email or organization…
label_editor.the_interactive_label_editor_script_is_n: The interactive label editor script is not loaded (it may be awaiting approval). You can still rename or delete the template; the stored design is kept as-is.
label_editor.unsaved_changes_click_save_to_store_this: Unsaved changes — click Save to store this design.
label_editor.uses_the_shared_check_in_printer_mode: Uses the shared Check-in printer mode.
label_editor.wraps_at_max_width_if_lines_exceed_max_l: Wraps at max width; if lines exceed max lines it retries with the 2nd, then 3rd size. 0 = off.
label_editor.values_to_preview_without_picking_a_gues: values to preview without picking a guest.

label_form.design_export_description: export from the legacy label editor (or this one) to start from that design — its size then wins over the width/height above. You can change everything later in the label editor.

labels.design_printable_name_badges_open_a_labe: Design printable name badges. Open a label to edit it in the label editor.
labels.name: Name

placeholder.blueprints_and_blocks_for_this_section_a: Blueprints and blocks for this section are already registered — author records in the CMS editor.

sessions.drag_a_session_to_reorder_it_edit_sessio: Drag a session to reorder it. Edit session details on the event page.
sessions.this_event_has_no_sessions_yet: This event has no sessions yet.
